Headline: #4 Cottage Grove and #115 Pullman / 115th Temporary Northbound Reroute near Cottage Grove / 111th
ShortDescription: Northbound  4 Cottage Grove and 115 Pullman / 115th buses are temporarily due to street blockage near Cottage Grove / 111th .

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Northbound #4 Cottage Grove and #115 Pullman/115th buses are temporarily rerouted via King Drive, 107th and Cottage Grove, over normal route due to street blockage near Cottage Grove/111th .

Southbound buses are not affected.

Allow extra travel time.

Headline: #50 Damen Temporary Northbound Reroute near Damen/18th
ShortDescription: Northbound #50 Damen buses are temp. rerouted via Damen, 18th, Ashland, Hastings & Damen, then resume their normal route due to street blockage near Damen/18th.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Northbound #50 Damen buses are temporarily rerouted via Damen, 18th, Ashland, Hastings and Damen, then resume their normal route.

Southbound buses are not affected.

Allow extra travel time.

Why is service being changed?

Buses are rerouted due to street blockage near Damen/18th.
